content.text:
REVIEW-FINDING: 2.3.9 WARN — PaywallView.swift:9 offers "1 week of Premium free" in exchange for a 5-star review, explicit quid-pro-quo review incentive copy.
Pierre: Apple explicitly prohibits offering rewards or incentives for reviews or ratings under 2.3.9 and this will trigger rejection during human review. Found in App/PaywallView.swift line 9: "Leave a 5-star review and get 1 week of Premium free!" Remove this string entirely and rely on the standard SKStoreReviewController prompt instead, which cannot be tied to any reward.
